name: fetch
description: HTTP fetch tool via MCP — retrieve web pages and API responses as markdown or raw text

files.pack.toml:
[pack]
name = "fetch"
version = "0.1.0"
description = "HTTP fetch tool via MCP — retrieve web pages and API responses as markdown or raw text"
authors = ["PackWeave"]
license = "MIT"
repository = "https://github.com/PackWeave/registry"
keywords = ["fetch", "http", "web", "api", "mcp"]

[[servers]]
name = "fetch"
command = "npx"
args = ["-y", "@modelcontextprotocol/server-fetch@latest"]
transport = "stdio"
tools = ["fetch"]
